title: BugTrack Pro
subtitle: System authentication for technical staff
alertMessage: Your account has been flagged for a policy violation. Please contact your system administrator or refer to the v2.4.0-stable security documentation.

messages.minLength: Username must be at least 3 characters.
messages.maxLength: Username may be at most 32 characters.
messages.pattern: Username may contain only letters, digits, and underscores.

messages.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Verify your username and password.
errors.network: Unable to reach authentication server. Check your connection.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: Proprietary software for authorized personnel only. Monitoring is active. Unauthorized access attempts are logged and reported to the QA Lead.
